"'''Heritage of the Sith'''" is an article in [[Star Wars Insider 88|''Star Wars Insider'' 88]] by [[Drew Karpyshyn]]. It provides an [[in-universe]] look at [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] history and philosophy. It was later included in ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine 65]]''.

{{Magazine-stub|article}}
